hero.subtitle: Sahbi brings small groups of like-minded people together for real meetups in Marrakech and Casablanca.
hero.headline: This app doesn't let you chat first.
hero.lead: Sahbi brings small groups of like-minded people together for real meetups in Marrakech and Casablanca.
hero.bullet3: Just real people, real places, and real moments.
hero.betaCaption: Beta launching soon in Morocco. The first 100 selected members get free access.

concept.title: Meet first. Chat later.
concept.body:
Most apps keep people stuck behind screens.
Sahbi does the opposite.
We match small groups of people and bring them together in real life, in curated public places,
for simple moments that can turn into real memories.
Because the best connections do not start with a swipe.
They start with presence.

problem.title: We are more connected than ever. But real connection feels harder than ever.
problem.body:
Today, people spend more time scrolling, swiping, and texting, yet still feel alone.

Conversations stay online.

Plans never happen.

New friendships become rare.

Sahbi was created to bring people back to what actually matters: meeting, talking, laughing, and living something real.

whatSahbi.title: A new way to meet people in Morocco.
whatSahbi.body:
Sahbi is a social app that organizes small real-life group meetups.

We help people discover new connections through shared outings like cafés, dinners, walks, activities, and casual group experiences.

It is not about chasing attention online.

It is about creating moments offline.

step1.title: Create your profile
step1.text: Tell us about your vibe, interests, and the kind of experiences you enjoy.

step2.title: Get matched
step2.text: Sahbi matches you with a small compatible group, usually 5 to 7 people.

step3.title: Meet in real life
step3.text: You join a curated meetup in a public place and experience a real moment with real people.

safety.title: Designed for real life. Built with trust in mind.

point1.title: Verified members
point1.text: Profiles go through verification to help keep the community authentic.

point2.title: Public venues
point2.text: Meetups happen in trusted public places.

point3.title: Small curated groups
point3.text: The experience is designed to feel natural, comfortable, and socially easy.

point4.title: Quality over quantity
point4.text: We are building Sahbi carefully to create the right atmosphere from the beginning.

emotional.title: Life is too short to live only on your phone.
emotional.body:
Some of the best moments in life happen when people are fully present.

Around a table.

In a café.

During a walk.

In a simple conversation that was never supposed to matter, but somehow does.

Sahbi exists to make more of those moments happen.

socialProof.line: Already 327 people are waiting to join Sahbi.

pricing.title: Sahbi Club
pricing.subtitle: Proposed pricing structure — prices in MAD.

standard.name: Standard Membership
standard.audience: Students, recent grads, and budget-conscious social seekers.
features: Unlimited RSVPs to Sahbi Day (brunches, coffee, casuals).

premium.name: Premium Membership
premium.audience: Young professionals (25+), executives, and those valuing safety and quality.
features: All Standard events + Exclusive Sahbi Night & Sahbi Forme.

payPerEvent.name: Pay-Per-Event (Std)
payPerEvent.audience: Curious newcomers, tourists, or infrequent participants.
features: One-time access to a Standard-tier event.
No ongoing community or app access.

payPerEventPrem.name: Pay-Per-Event (Prem)
payPerEventPrem.audience: Professionals "testing the waters" or out-of-town visitors.
features: One-time access to a Premium-tier event.
Subject to screening/invitation for vibe control.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Sahbi ("we", "our") is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information.

collect.title: Data collected
items: Photos, bio, age, profession and interests

share.title: Data sharing
share.text: We never sell your data to third parties. Information shared with partner restaurants is limited to what is strictly necessary for reservation.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.text: You can request access, rectification or deletion of your data at any time. Contact us to exercise your rights.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using Sahbi, you accept these terms. Please read them carefully.

1.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
1.content: Access to and use of Sahbi implies full acceptance of these terms. If you do not accept them, please do not use our service.

2.title: 2. Service description
2.content: Sahbi is a group meetup app that organizes meals in partner restaurants. The service includes matching, booking and post-meetup communication features.

3.title: 3. Registration and account
3.content: To use Sahbi, you must create an account with accurate information. You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential. Accounts are personal and non-transferable.

4.title: 4. Behavior and respect
4.content: You agree to behave respectfully during meetups. Any inappropriate behavior, harassment or lack of punctuality may result in suspension or exclusion from the service.

5.title: 5. Subscription and payment
5.content: Sahbi Day (59 MAD/month) and Sahbi Night (199 MAD/month) subscriptions give access to meetups. The meal is paid directly at the restaurant. Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled.

6.title: 6. Cancellation and refund
6.content: Cancellations must be made at least 24h before the event. Repeated no-shows may result in account suspension. Refunds are processed according to our policy.

7.title: 7. Modifications
7.content: Sahbi reserves the right to modify these terms. Users will be informed of significant changes. Continued use after modification constitutes acceptance.

events.subtitle: Shared moments in cafés, dinners, walks, and casual group experiences — not endless swiping.

faq.title: Questions, answered
faq.subtitle: Straight answers about trust, safety, and what Sahbi is (and isn't).
faq.a1: No. Sahbi is about small group meetups and real-life connection in public places — not matching people to chat online for weeks. Meet first, chat later.
faq.q2: How do you keep meetups safe and comfortable?
faq.a2: Profiles are verified, groups are small and curated, and meetups happen in trusted public venues. We're building carefully so the atmosphere feels natural and socially easy — especially for women.
faq.q3: Who will I be matched with?
faq.a3: Sahbi matches you with a small compatible group — usually 5 to 7 people — based on your vibe, interests, and the kind of experiences you enjoy.
faq.a4: In curated public places: cafés, restaurants, walks, and other group-friendly spots in Marrakech and Casablanca during the beta.
faq.a5: We're opening access gradually to build the right community and make the first experience great. The first 100 selected members get free beta access.
faq.a6: We're starting with Marrakech and Casablanca. More cities may follow as we grow.

feedback.title: We'd love to hear from you
feedback.subtitle: Questions, ideas, or feedback — we're building Sahbi with the community.
feedback.name: Your name
